features: Package includes: comes with 60 pieces of 2-ply paper cocktail beverage napkins in 6 assorted colors, including green, blue, orange, rose red, purple and yellow, abundant quality and color choices to meet your multiple purposes
Convenient Size: Our lovely tissue party tableware napkins measures 6.5 inches / 16 cm after folded and 9.8x 9.8 inches/25 x 25 cm when unfolded, a proper size for you to decorate your party.
High Quality:This cocktail napkin is made of virgin wood pulp with 2 layers in total, not easy to tear, durable and absorbent.
Wide Usage:These colorful napkins are good party favors and decorations, suitable for catering, food service, fiestas, parties, celebrations, cocktail evenings, luncheons, buffets and daily use

Wide Occasions: our disposable dinner napkins are ideal paper napkins for many occasions, such as birthday party, pride party, fiesta party, 80s themed party, neon party, glow themed party, Mexican party, cocktail party and daily dinner party
description: -- Keep your table clean and safe from liquids, food stains and scratches -- ideal for serving cocktails, appetizers, desserts, or cleaning up messes, good party helpers to you -- suitable for catering, food service, fiestas, parties, celebrations, cocktail evenings, luncheons, buffets and daily use
